2026-05-21T21:25:48.8675780Z ##[group]Run set -eo pipefail
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8676169Z [36;1mset -eo pipefail[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8676451Z [36;1mmkdir -p "${RUNNER_TEMP}/gh-aw/mcp-config"[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8676725Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8677032Z [36;1m# Export gateway environment variables for MCP config and gateway script[0m

2026-05-21T21:25:48.8679070Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8679390Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR="/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads"[0m

2026-05-21T21:25:48.8681029Z [36;1mMCP_GATEWAY_UID=$(id -u 2>/dev/null || echo '0')[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8681349Z [36;1mMCP_GATEWAY_GID=$(id -g 2>/dev/null || echo '0')[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8681978Z [36;1mcase "${DOCKER_HOST:-}" in[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8682487Z [36;1m  unix://* ) DOCKER_SOCK_PATH="${DOCKER_HOST#unix://}" ;;[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8682815Z [36;1m  /* ) DOCKER_SOCK_PATH="$DOCKER_HOST" ;;[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8683121Z [36;1m  * ) DOCKER_SOCK_PATH=/var/run/docker.sock ;;[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8683386Z [36;1mesac[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8683688Z [36;1mDOCKER_SOCK_GID=$(stat -c '%g' "$DOCKER_SOCK_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo '0')[0m
2026-05-21T21:25:48.8688040Z [36;1mexport MCP_GATEWAY_DOCKER_COMMAND='docker run -i --rm --network host --add-host host.docker.internal:127.0.0.1 --user '"${MCP_GATEWAY_UID}"':'"${MCP_GATEWAY_GID}"' --group-add '"${DOCKER_SOCK_GID}"' -v '"${DOCKER_SOCK_PATH}"':/var/run/docker.sock -e MCP_GATEWAY_PORT -e MCP_GATEWAY_DOMAIN -e MCP_GATEWAY_API_KEY -e MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_DIR -e MCP_GATEWAY_PAYLOAD_SIZE_THRESHOLD -e DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock -e DEBUG -e MCP_GATEWAY_LOG_DIR -e GH_AW_MCP_LOG_DIR -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_CONFIG_PATH -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_TOOLS_PATH -e GH_AW_ASSETS_BRANCH -e GH_AW_ASSETS_MAX_SIZE_KB -e GH_AW_ASSETS_ALLOWED_EXTS -e DEFAULT_BRANCH -e GITHUB_MCP_SERVER_TOKEN -e GITHUB_MCP_GUARD_MIN_INTEGRITY -e GITHUB_MCP_GUARD_REPOS -e GITHUB_REPOSITORY -e GITHUB_SERVER_URL -e GITHUB_SHA -e GITHUB_WORKSPACE -e GITHUB_TOKEN -e GITHUB_RUN_ID -e GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER -e GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT -e GITHUB_JOB -e GITHUB_ACTION -e GITHUB_EVENT_NAME -e GITHUB_EVENT_PATH -e GITHUB_ACTOR -e GITHUB_ACTOR_ID -e GITHUB_TRIGGERING_ACTOR -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF -e GITHUB_WORKFLOW_SHA -e GITHUB_REF -e GITHUB_REF_NAME -e GITHUB_REF_TYPE -e GITHUB_HEAD_REF -e GITHUB_BASE_REF -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_PORT -e GH_AW_SAFE_OUTPUTS_API_KEY -v /tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads:/tmp/gh-aw/mcp-payloads:rw -v /opt:/opt:ro -v /tmp:/tmp:rw -v '"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}"':'"${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}"':rw ghcr.io/github/gh-aw-mcpg:v0.3.9'[0m
